name: Save Panel
title: Save Panel
intro: In the Save As dialog you can save the panel with a new name or in a new directory.
This dialog automatically opens when the panel is saved for the first time, where the name and storage location of the panel can be entered.

paragraphs: With this activated option you can integrate your created panels into the currently loaded CANoe/CANalyzer configuration.

sections.heading: Use File Name as Panel Name

paragraphs: With this activated option the panel file automatically get the name of the panel that should be saved.
